stories.title: Piastri Confirms McLaren Stay — Zak Brown: "No Conversations" with Verstappen

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Verstappen-to-McLaren swap is DEAD.

Zak Brown: "They're rumours? No conversations."

Oscar Piastri on his future: "Yes." He's staying.

Verstappen said "No" and "Nothing" when asked for an update.

The silence speaks loudest.

#F1 #Formula1

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Verstappen has a Red Bull exit clause.
He can trigger it between August and October.
McLaren has denied conversations.
Piastri has confirmed he's staying.

So where does Verstappen go?

The 2027 driver market just got a lot more interesting.

#F1 #MaxVerstappen

article.headline: Piastri Confirms McLaren, Brown Denies Verstappen Talks: The Swap That Won't Happen

stories.title: Hungarian GP Preview — Antonelli Eyes Extension, Summer Break Imminent

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
F1 heads to Budapest.

Hungarian GP: July 24-26. Last race before the summer break.

Antonelli leads by 45 points. Russell is 50 back. Verstappen's exit clause window opens after this race.

The stakes at the Hungaroring are massive.

#F1 #HungarianGP

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
After the Hungarian GP, Formula 1 goes dark for 3 weeks.

When it comes back:
— Antonelli's title lead will be clearer
— Verstappen's clause will be activatable
— The 2027 driver market will start moving

The summer break is where F1 gets interesting.

#F1 #HungarianGP

stories.title: Antonelli's Youngest-Champion Quest — The Numbers Behind the Historic Run

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Kimi Antonelli. 19 years old. 6 wins. 204 points.

If he wins the 2026 F1 World Championship, he becomes the FIRST TEENAGER in history to do it.

The record now? Sebastian Vettel, 21 years old in 2010.

Antonelli is rewriting the record books.

#F1 #Antonelli

stories.title: Russell's Title Challenge Is Fading Fast

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
George Russell is 50 points behind Antonelli with 8 races left.

That's 200 maximum points available.

He needs to win nearly EVERY race while Antonelli finishes off the podium.

The Belgian DNF may have ended his title challenge.

#F1 #GeorgeRussell

stories.title: The 2027 F1 Driver Market Takes Shape

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Who is confirmed for 2027?

✅ Antonelli — Mercedes
✅ Russell — Mercedes
✅ Hamilton — Ferrari
✅ Leclerc — Ferrari
✅ Piastri — McLaren

❓ Verstappen — can trigger exit clause in October

The biggest seat in F1 might be opening up.

#F1 #Formula1
